title: This Olympic Mystery Could Help Us Find Aliens
description:
The weirdest Olympic sport could help us find aliens… and it has to do with the science of rubbing. Yep.

Usually, when you send something spinning, it moves in the opposite direction that you spin it.

But in curling, that’s not what happens… 

To see the top 3 theories and learn why this is THE sport you should be watching, watch our longer video and subscribe!

#science #curling #physics #mystery #shorts
